title: The Forest Anomaly
description: This creature you can’t stop. You can’t run. You cannot hide. Once he’s here, you’re no longer.
body:
Forest Anomaly
"You thought the woods were safe at night... You were wrong."

About:

The Forest Anomaly mod introduces a terrifying new entity that haunts your Minecraft world. As days pass, this unseen predator grows bolder, stalking players with escalating aggression until a final, devastating confrontation. Perfect for horror enthusiasts and players seeking a thrilling survival challenge!

Features:


The anomaly becomes increasingly aggressive as in-game days progress
Exhibits stalker-like behavior: teleports nearby, leaves ominous messages, and manipulates the environment
Final Showdown on Day 35 – survive its ultimate attack or face permanent consequences


Remains invisible until attacking
Detects player movement and light sources
Forces eternal night after Day 20


Smooth GeckoLib-powered animations for crawling, climbing, and attacking
Contextual movements adapt to terrain (crawls in tight spaces, climbs obstacles)


Completely invincible – cannot be killed or damaged
Inflicts blindness during attacks
Disables creative/spectator mode cheats
Installation

Requires Forge 47.2.1 for Minecraft 1.20.1
Install GeckoLib 4.2.3
Place forest_anomaly.jar in your mods folder
Compatibility

✅ Singleplayer & Multiplayer
✅ Works with most dimension/biome mods
❌ Not compatible with "peaceful" difficulty

Warning: This mod is designed to create intense horror experiences. Not recommended for young players or those easily startled!

Credits

Developed by CelestialCodes13
Powered by GeckoLib
Inspired by classic horror tropes and community creepypastas
"Can you survive until dawn... or will you become another forest mystery?"


THANK YOU FOR DOWNLOADING MY MOD AND IT WOULD BE A HUGE SUPPORT IF YOU FOLLOW ME ON CURSEFORGE AND SUBSCRIBE TO MY YT CHANNEL (https://www.youtube.com/@CelestialLivesYT)
